role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified absence of linguistic cues.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and vegetation.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant types and soil conditions.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road markings and traffic rules.

visual_consistency_notes.meta: Described poles and road surface accurately.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The agents failed to identify the location as the US, instead converging on Southern Africa due to a shared misinterpretation of the double yellow center line as a left-hand traffic indicator. The judge followed this consensus without critical evaluation of the driving side, leading to a completely incorrect prediction.
verdict.region_narrowing_notes: The judge accepted a consensus on Southern Africa despite the visual evidence (double yellow lines) being a strong indicator of right-hand traffic (North America). The reasoning failed to reconcile the road markings with the agents' incorrect assumption of left-hand traffic.
verdict.hypothesis_pool_notes: The pool consisted entirely of Southern African nations (South Africa, Namibia, Botswana), which are visually implausible given the specific North American road infrastructure (double yellow lines) and landscape features (red sandstone mesas) present in the image.
